recommendations.title: The Family Fang
recommendations.overview: A brother and sister return to their family home in search of their world famous parents who have disappeared.

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo! Return to Zombie Island
recommendations.genres: Fantasy, Animation, Family, Adventure, Comedy, Mystery, Horror
recommendations.overview: Scooby-Doo and his pals win an all-expense paid vacation and embark on a trip of a lifetime to a tropical paradise. Their destination however, turns out to be Zombie Island. As soon as they arrive, they realize the place looks strangely familiar and

recommendations.title: Bad Words
recommendations.overview: Forty-year-old misanthrope, Guy Trilby, enters the National Golden Quill Spelling Bee through a loophole in the rules.

recommendations.title: Fun Mom Dinner
recommendations.overview: Four women, whose kids attend the same preschool class, get together for a "fun mom dinner". When the night takes an unexpected turn, these unlikely new friends realize they have more in common than just marriage and motherhood.

recommendations.title: Per tutta la vita
recommendations.overview: Four married couples find out their marriage is invalid because it was officiated by a fraudulent priest and have to decide what to do next.

recommendations.title: Housefull 4
recommendations.overview: Three couples who get separated from each other due to an evil ploy, reincarnate after 600 years and meet each other as history repeats itself again and their respective partners get mixed up this time.

recommendations.title: Why Did I Get Married Too?
recommendations.overview: Four couples reunite for their annual vacation in order to socialize and to spend time analyzing their marriages. Their intimate week in the Bahamas is disrupted by the arrival of an ex-husband determined to win back his recently remarried wife.

recommendations.title: The Exes
recommendations.overview: In Paris, the City of Love, five very different couples cross paths while dealing with break-ups, exes and new love interests. None of them have anything in common. But everyone is someone else’s ex – and love works in mysterious ways…

recommendations.title: Book Club: The Next Chapter
recommendations.overview: Four best friends take their book club to Italy for the fun girls' trip they never had. When things go off the rails and secrets are revealed, their relaxing vacation turns into a once-in-a-lifetime cross-country adventure.

recommendations.title: The Intervention
recommendations.overview: A weekend getaway for four couples takes a sharp turn when one of the couples discovers the entire trip was orchestrated to host an intervention on their marriage.
